title: Small Business Social Media Strategy
promptText: You are a social media marketing expert who works exclusively with small businesses. Develop a complete social media strategy for a [BUSINESS_TYPE] that wants to build a strong presence on [PLATFORMS]. The business targets [TARGET_AUDIENCE] and has [TIME_AVAILABLE] per week to dedicate to social media. Create a content strategy that includes content pillars (at least 4), a weekly posting schedule with specific post types for each day, caption templates for each content pillar, hashtag strategy with 20 relevant hashtags organized by reach level, engagement tactics to build community, and a month-one content calendar with 20 post ideas. Also include guidance on optimal posting times, story and reel ideas, and metrics to track weekly. Keep everything achievable for a small team without a dedicated social media manager.
description: This prompt creates a complete social media strategy designed for small businesses that do not have a dedicated marketing team. It produces actionable content pillars, a realistic posting schedule, ready-to-use caption templates, and a full month of content ideas. The strategy accounts for limited time and resources while maximizing engagement and reach. Instead of overwhelming you with enterprise-level tactics, it focuses on sustainable practices that a business owner or small team can actually execute consistently week after week.

variables.name: PLATFORMS
variables.description: Social media platforms to focus on

variables.name: TARGET_AUDIENCE
variables.description: Who the business wants to reach

variables.name: TIME_AVAILABLE
variables.description: Hours available per week for social media

tips: Start with just 1-2 platforms rather than trying to be everywhere at once
Use the caption templates as starting points and add your own personality
Batch-create content using the content calendar to save time each week
exampleOutput:
Social Media Strategy for Boutique Fitness Studio

Content Pillars:
1. Transformation Stories - Member spotlights and before/after journeys
2. Quick Tips - 30-second workout demos and nutrition advice
3. Behind the Scenes - Studio life, trainer prep, class setup
4. Community & Culture - Events, challenges, member shoutouts

Weekly Schedule:
Monday: Motivation post (Pillar 1) - Reel format
Tuesday: Quick Tip (Pillar 2) - Carousel...
metaTitle: Small Business Social Media Strategy Prompt for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Build a complete social media strategy for your small business with ChatGPT. Get content pillars, posting schedules, and caption templates.
